description_long: This is a large, rectangular university building with a symmetrical facade and a prominent central section topped by a small cupola. The exterior walls are clad in red brick, punctuated by evenly spaced white-framed windows across all floors. The roof is pitched and covered in teal-colored material, with the central section slightly taller and more pronounced. The main entrance features a set of stairs leading up to double doors, flanked by columns and a decorative archway. The building sits on a landscaped plot with a wide pathway and green lawns on either side. The overall design is formal and institutional, evoking a traditional academic atmosphere.
description: A large, red-brick university building with a teal pitched roof, symmetrical windows, and a central cupola, set on landscaped grounds with a main entry stairway.
description_view_0: End view showing the building's gabled roof, rear entrance, and the landscaped grounds extending behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical facade, central cupola, and the main entryway with stairs and columns.
description_view_2: Opposite end view displaying the gabled roof and rear elevation, with visible pathways and green space.
description_view_3: Frontal view showcasing the main entrance, wide stairway, columned porch, and the full expanse of the building's facade.
attribute_entryway_design: The main entryway features a wide set of concrete stairs leading up to double doors framed by white columns and a decorative arch, with a small landing and metal railings on either side.
